channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Morgan Stanley just poured through 3,600 stocks and says these are the best opportunities from the AI shakeout
item.description: Morgan Stanley strategists offer criteria on how to find the AI winners, saying the market is starting to demand proof of return on equity.

item.title: ‘I feel the clock ticking’: My wife and I are in our 60s — and employ 48 people in a small town. Can we ever retire?
item.description: “We could survive financially, but my people would not.”

item.title: These brain exercises could cut your dementia risk by 20% over 20 years
item.description: We’re winning the fight against dementia, one battle at a time.

item.title: Taking the new Wegovy pill every day is really complicated. Will patients stick with it?
item.description: ‘It’s not an easy pill to take’: The first highly anticipated GLP-1 pill is here, but physicians aren’t sure it has the staying power of the injection...

item.title: Gold and silver are rallying again ahead of payrolls report
item.description: Gold and silver futures each rallied on Wednesday, with investors assessing the likelihood of Federal Reserve rate cuts as well as geopolitical tensio...

item.title: Baird upgrades Dick’s Sporting Goods on Foot Locker recovery and growing market share
item.description: Baird sees shares of Dick's Sporting Goods rising 27% from here.

item.title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: Worries over how artificial intelligence may disrupt financial services weighed on the S&P 500, pulling the broad market index down on Tuesday.

item.title: Citi, JPMorgan downgrade Mattel after earnings miss and disappointing guidance
item.description: Shares of Mattel plunged 28% in Wednesday's premarket trading session.

item.title: The AI threat wrecked software stocks. Now financial stocks look next with LPL closing 8% lower
item.description: Financial services firms tanked after the launch of a new AI-powered tax planning tool that promises to do the work "within minutes."

item.title: Vatican Bank makes first foray into equity indexes, setting stage for potential ETF launches
item.description: The Holy See-linked bank debuted two indexes tracking 50 stocks that it said align with Catholic teachings, marking a push into retail investment prod...

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...

item.title: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) Soars on Promising Inflammation Drug Data
item.description: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) stock surges over 42% on positive Phase 1 data for MRT-8102, showing profound reductions in inflammation marker hsCRP. ...
